name: tela
description: Search, read, and write your tela wiki from Claude Desktop.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to a tela instance — a self-hostable, markdown-native team wiki — via its built-in MCP server. Lets Claude search, read, and author wiki pages with scoped, per-tool write permissions. Wraps the tela-mcp stdio↔HTTP proxy; point it at your own origin to use a self-hosted instance.

base_url.title: tela base URL
base_url.description: Origin of your tela instance, e.g. https://telawiki.com or your self-hosted host.

api_key.title: API token
api_key.description: A tela personal access token (tela_pat_...). Create one in Settings → API tokens.
